# GitHub Copilot — Workspace Instructions

> Inherited from [workspaceShare](https://github.com/wesleyzilva/workspaceShare).
> See the full specification at .github/copilot-instructions.md in that repository.

## Global Standards (all projects)

- **Language:** English C2 in all code, comments, and documentation
- **Methodology:** STAR + Agile + AI-Guided + Data-Driven
- **Commits:** Conventional Commits — eat, ix, chore, efactor, docs, style, 	est, perf, ci
- **Angular:** Signals, standalone components, OnPush, inject(), native control flow
- **Security:** OWASP Top 10 baseline — no secrets committed, sanitise all inputs

## This Project: whatsappSenderHttp

- **Type:** Node.js + Python — WhatsApp bulk sender
